hits.label: At nu=1, MoTe2/WSe2 shows two displacement-field-driven topological phase transitions between frustrated, QAH-Mott, and valley-coherent antiferromagnetic insulators.

provenance.method: Codex curation pass from arXiv abstract

hits.summary: The 2026 arXiv report says increasing displacement field drives an angle-aligned MoTe2/WSe2 moire heterobilayer from a geometrically frustrated Mott insulator to a ferromagnetic QAH Mott insulator and then to an antiferromagnetic valley-coherent Mott state, with the first transition occurring without an observed charge-gap closure.

hits.label: an applied layer potential difference can tune band topology, Mott gaps, spin-orbit terms, and effective Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions in twisted bilayer WSe2
hits.summary: an applied layer potential difference can tune band topology, Mott gaps, spin-orbit terms, and effective Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions in twisted bilayer WSe2 Use for: direct pre-2023 theory link between displacement field and correlated or topological phase control in twisted TMD homobilayers

hits.label: Band topology, Hubbard model, Heisenberg model, and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction in twisted bilayer WSe2
hits.summary: an applied layer potential difference can tune band topology, Mott gaps, spin-orbit terms, and effective Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions in twisted bilayer WSe2 Use for: direct pre-2023 theory link between displacement field and correlated or topological phase control in twisted TMD homobilayers

hits.label: transport, trion PL, and RMCD together support zero-field FQAH states in twisted MoTe2
hits.summary: transport, trion PL, and RMCD together support zero-field FQAH states in twisted MoTe2 strong states near `nu = -1, -2/3, -3/5` Use for: optical plus magnetic sensing of topological states

hits.label: Microscopic signatures of topology in twisted MoTe2
hits.summary: STM/STS resolves local signatures of topological wavefunction texture Use for: microscopic intuition about why the bands are topological

hits.label: Regarding the existence of abelian fractional topological insulators in twisted MoTe2 and related systems
hits.summary: Official Xu Group publication (2026). Venue hint: Communications Physics. Topics: moire_tmote2, topological_quantum_materials.

hits.label: local magnetic imaging directly resolves orbital magnetization and disorder in twisted-MoTe2 fractional Chern states
hits.summary: local magnetic imaging directly resolves orbital magnetization and disorder in twisted-MoTe2 fractional Chern states Use for: when a transport or optical anomaly might actually be a real-space inhomogeneity problem

hits.label: trion PL and RMCD can act as filling-sensitive optical probes of integer and fractional Chern states in twisted MoTe2
hits.summary: trion PL and RMCD can act as filling-sensitive optical probes of integer and fractional Chern states in twisted MoTe2 the paper highlights strong signatures near `nu = -1, -2/3, -3/5` Use for: the main optical bridge between PL/RMCD observables and correlated topological phases

hits.label: Circularly polarized light can non-thermally reverse spin-valley order and switch Chern order in twisted MoTe2 at zero field.

provenance.method: Codex curation pass from arXiv abstract

hits.summary: The 2025 arXiv report says resonant excitation of the attractive polaron transition dynamically reverses the spin-valley orientation of correlated MoTe2 phases, giving direct optical control of a topological order parameter at zero magnetic field.

hits.label: Hidden states and dynamics of fractional fillings in twisted MoTe2 bilayers
hits.summary: ultrafast optical spectroscopy reveals many hidden fractional states invisible in static transport nearly 20 hidden states and two melting timescales, about `2-4 ps` and `180-270 ps` Use for: optical nonequilibrium or hidden-state interpretation
